properties.name: Upper Bhotekoshi
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: Existing Bhote Koshi valley plant; useful as a reality-check site where imagery and river geometry are both legible.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Kali Gandaki A
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: One of Nepal's most important operating anchor plants and a good benchmark for marker honesty in the Gandaki corridor.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Andhi Khola
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: Small plant, but the site is visible and it already anchors one of the promising-storage comparisons in the current narrative.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Upper Tamakoshi
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
properties.priority_read: The largest commissioned domestic project in the current stack; deserves a dedicated watch-layer marker instead of only appearing in the top-MW list.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Tanahu
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: Most practical near-term storage addition in the checked official set; this stays on the watch layer even when the broader project cloud is off.
properties.source_note: NEA annual report FY 2024/25 and current project registry

properties.name: Upper Trishuli-1
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: High-value central-north project tied to the Trishuli evacuation corridor; worth keeping visible in the grid-first map.
properties.source_note: Naxa / DoED-linked public hydropower project dataset

properties.name: Nalsyau Gad
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point
properties.priority_read: Best dry-energy performer in the JICA promising-storage set, so it belongs on the survey radar even before a full site-grade document pass.
properties.source_note: JICA/NEA storage master plan volume 2 plus current project registry

properties.name: Mugu Karnali Storage
properties.location_basis: Official project-area center from the VUCL MKHEP project page, snapped to the mapped Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Largest survey-stage project in the registry; strategically important enough to stay visible despite lower locational confidence.
properties.source_note: VUCL MKHEP project page and current project registry

properties.name: Arun 3
properties.location_basis: Document-backed Arun dam-site vicinity near Num, snapped to the named Arun reach
properties.priority_read: National-scale eastern corridor project; included as an on-radar survey reference even though the registry point is still approximate.
properties.source_note: SAPDC resettlement plan and current project registry

properties.name: Upper Karnali
properties.location_basis: Document-backed powerhouse vicinity near Tallo Balde Khola from the IBN Energy Sector Profile
properties.priority_read: Too strategically important to bury inside the general survey cloud, even though the current public coordinate remains low-confidence.
properties.source_note: IBN Energy Sector Profile, DoED survey-license extent, and current project registry

properties.name: Betan Karnali
properties.location_basis: Document-backed powerhouse-village vicinity at Tatalighat, snapped to the named Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Large Karnali-basin survey project that matters for the storage-and-seasonality story; kept visible as a radar candidate.
properties.source_note: BKSHCL EOI document and current project registry

properties.name: Phukot Karnali
properties.location_basis: Official project-area center from the VUCL PKHEP status report, already close to the mapped Karnali reach
properties.priority_read: Another major Karnali-basin survey project worth tracking explicitly while the map still distinguishes approximate survey references from site points.
properties.source_note: VUCL PKHEP status report and current project registry
